metadata.title: File Explorer Note Count
metadata.description: The plugin helps you to see the number of notes under each folder within the file explorer.

regex.target: .log('未找到文件资源管理器，正在重试...')
text: '文件资源管理器笔记数量设置'

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on this option if you want to see the number of notes even after you expand the collapsed folders')
regex.target: .setDesc('开启此选项后，即使展开已折叠的文件夹也能看到笔记数量')

regex.source:
.setDesc('By default, there is no root folder provided by Obsidian. It is moved to drop-down menu to switch between vaults. ' +
            'Enable this option if you want to see root folder and its count in the file explorer')
regex.target:
.setDesc('默认情况下，Obsidian 不提供根文件夹，它被移动到下拉菜单用于切换保管库。' +
            '启用此选项可在文件资源管理器中查看根文件夹及其数量')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn off this option to choose file that should be counted')
regex.target: .setDesc('关闭此选项以选择需要计数的文件')

regex.source: .setDesc('Turn on this option to use Filter List to exclude files')
regex.target: .setDesc('开启此选项以使用过滤列表排除文件')

regex.source: .setPlaceholder('Leave it empty to count all types of files')
regex.target: .setPlaceholder('留空以计数所有类型的文件')

regex.source: .appendText('Extension list to include/exclude file during counting')
regex.target: .appendText('计数时包含/排除文件的扩展名列表')
